RETURN

    VALUES(silver_building_master[building_id]),
    VAR _btype   = LOOKUPVALUE(
                       silver_building_master[building_type],
                       silver_building_master[building_id],
                       silver_building_master[building_id]
                   )
    VAR _country = LOOKUPVALUE(
                       silver_building_master[country_code],
                       silver_building_master[building_id],
                       silver_building_master[building_id]
                   )
    RETURN
    COALESCE(
        LOOKUPVALUE(
            gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_15c_kgco2_m2_yr],
            gold_crrem_pathway[building_type], _btype,
            gold_crrem_pathway[country_code],  _country,
            gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_year],  _year
        ),
        LOOKUPVALUE(
            gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_15c_kgco2_m2_yr],
            gold_crrem_pathway[building_type], _btype,
            gold_crrem_pathway[country_code],  "EU",
            gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_year],  _year
        ),
        LOOKUPVALUE(
            gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_15c_kgco2_m2_yr],
            gold_crrem_pathway[building_type], "office",
            gold_crrem_pathway[country_code],  "EU",
            gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_year],  _year
        )

VAR _country   = SELECTEDVALUE(silver_building_master[country_code], "EU")
VAR _today     = YEAR(TODAY())

// Tam eşleşme: bina türü + ülke
VAR _exact =
    MINX(
        FILTER(
            ALL(gold_crrem_pathway),
            gold_crrem_pathway[building_type]         = _btype
            && gold_crrem_pathway[country_code]       = _country
            && gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_2c_kgco2_m2_yr] < _intensity
            && gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_year]       >= _today
        ),
        gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_year]
    )

// Fallback 1: aynı bina türü, EU ülkesi
VAR _eu_fb =
    MINX(
        FILTER(
            ALL(gold_crrem_pathway),
            gold_crrem_pathway[building_type]         = _btype
            && gold_crrem_pathway[country_code]       = "EU"
            && gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_2c_kgco2_m2_yr] < _intensity
            && gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_year]       >= _today
        ),
        gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_year]
    )

// Fallback 2: office + EU (genel)
VAR _off_fb =
    MINX(
        FILTER(
            ALL(gold_crrem_pathway),
            gold_crrem_pathway[building_type]         = "office"
            && gold_crrem_pathway[country_code]       = "EU"
            && gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_2c_kgco2_m2_yr] < _intensity
            && gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_year]       >= _today
        ),
        gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_year]
    )

VAR _result = COALESCE(_exact, _eu_fb, _off_fb)

RETURN
IF(

    BLANK(),
    IF(
        ISBLANK(_result),
        // Pathway hiç bina yoğunluğunun altına düşmüyor → 2050 sonrası (pratik: 2050)
        2050,
        _result
    )
)
","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"references":{"unrecognizedReferences":false,"measures":[{"schema":"extension","entity":"gold_recommendations","name":"Carbon Intensity kgCO2 m2 yr"}]},"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"VAR _excessNow","dataType":3,"expression":"_currentIntensity - _pathwayCurrent

                // Binanın sabit yoğunluğu ile düşen pathway ne zaman kesişir?

                // (excess negatif, slope negatif → bölen pozitif → doğru yıl)
                _currentYear + INT(DIVIDE(ABS(_excessNow), ABS(_pathwaySlope), BLANK()))
            )
        )
    )

VAR _gasF  = 0.2017   // kgCO₂/kWh — doğalgaz scope 1 (BAFA/IPCC 2006)
VAR _elecF = 0.350    // kgCO₂e/kWh — AB elektrik şebekesi ort. 2024

// Her bina için sistem tipine göre ısıtma emisyonu
VAR _heatingKg =
    SUMX (
        VALUES ( gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] ),
        VAR _bid = gold_hvac_analytics[building_id]
        VAR _sys =
            CALCULATE (
                MAX ( gold_hvac_analytics[system_type] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
            )
        // Scope 1 (fosil gaz): gas_boiler, hybrid (muhafazakâr)
        // Scope 2 (elektrik) : heat_pump, gshp, wshp, vrf, electric
        // Scope 3 / ağ bazlı: district (kaynak tarafı izlenmeli)
        // Biomass: scope 1 ama biyojenik karbon → CSRD Annex I ayrımı
        VAR _isScope1 = _sys = "gas_boiler" || _sys = "hybrid" || _sys = "biomass"
        VAR _heatKwh  =
            CALCULATE (
                SUM ( gold_hvac_analytics[heating_energy_kwh] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
            )
        RETURN IF ( _isScope1, _heatKwh * _gasF, _heatKwh * _elecF )
    )

// Soğutma + havalandırma: her zaman elektrik
VAR _coolingKg = SUM ( gold_hvac_analytics[cooling_energy_kwh] ) * _elecF
VAR _ventKg    = SUM ( gold_hvac_analytics[ventilation_kwh] )    * _elecF

RETURN
    DIVIDE ( _heatingKg + _coolingKg + _ventKg, 1000 )","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"HVAC CO2 Display v39","dataType":3,"expression":"

// v39 HVAC CO2 tCO2 v39 ile aynı hesap — daha kısa format
VAR _gasF  = 0.2017   -- DE/AT/NL scope 1: BAFA/IPCC 2024
VAR _elecF = 0.350    -- EU avg scope 2: EEA 2024
VAR _total_kg =
    SUMX (
        VALUES ( gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] ),
        VAR _bid = gold_hvac_analytics[building_id]
        VAR _sys =
            CALCULATE (
                MAX ( gold_hvac_analytics[system_type] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
            )
        VAR _isScope1 = _sys = "gas_boiler" || _sys = "hybrid" || _sys = "biomass"
        VAR _hkwh =
            CALCULATE (
                SUM ( gold_hvac_analytics[heating_energy_kwh] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
            )
        VAR _ckwh =
            CALCULATE (
                SUM ( gold_hvac_analytics[cooling_energy_kwh] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
            )
        VAR _vkwh =
            CALCULATE (
                SUM ( gold_hvac_analytics[ventilation_kwh] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
            )
        VAR _hkg  = IF ( _isScope1, COALESCE ( _hkwh, 0 ) * _gasF,  COALESCE ( _hkwh, 0 ) * _elecF )
        VAR _ckg  = COALESCE ( _ckwh, 0 ) * _elecF
        VAR _vkg  = COALESCE ( _vkwh, 0 ) * _elecF
        RETURN _hkg + _ckg + _vkg
    )
RETURN
    IF ( ISBLANK ( _total_kg ), "—",
         FORMAT ( ROUND ( DIVIDE ( _total_kg, 1000 ), 1 ), "0.0" ) & " tCO₂" )","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"Card: CO2 Label v40","dataType":3,"expression":"
// Scope 1 (gaz) vs Scope 2 (elektrik) ayrımı — CSRD için kritik
VAR _gasF  = 0.2017
VAR _elecF = 0.350
VAR _s1_kg =
    SUMX (
        VALUES ( gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] ),
        VAR _bid = gold_hvac_analytics[building_id]
        VAR _sys =
            CALCULATE ( MAX ( gold_hvac_analytics[system_type] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid ) )
        VAR _isScope1 = _sys = "gas_boiler" || _sys = "hybrid" || _sys = "biomass"
        VAR _hkwh =
            CALCULATE ( SUM ( gold_hvac_analytics[heating_energy_kwh] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid ) )
        RETURN IF ( _isScope1, COALESCE ( _hkwh, 0 ) * _gasF, 0 )
    )
VAR _total_kg =
    SUMX (
        VALUES ( gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] ),
        VAR _bid  = gold_hvac_analytics[building_id]
        VAR _sys  =
            CALCULATE ( MAX ( gold_hvac_analytics[system_type] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid ) )
        VAR _is1  = _sys = "gas_boiler" || _sys = "hybrid" || _sys = "biomass"
        VAR _hkwh =
            CALCULATE ( SUM ( gold_hvac_analytics[heating_energy_kwh] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid ) )
        VAR _ckwh =
            CALCULATE ( SUM ( gold_hvac_analytics[cooling_energy_kwh] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid ) )
        VAR _vkwh =
            CALCULATE ( SUM ( gold_hvac_analytics[ventilation_kwh] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid ) )
        RETURN
            IF ( _is1, COALESCE(_hkwh,0)*_gasF, COALESCE(_hkwh,0)*_elecF )
            + COALESCE(_ckwh,0)*_elecF
            + COALESCE(_vkwh,0)*_elecF
    )
VAR _s1_pct = ROUND ( DIVIDE ( _s1_kg, _total_kg ) * 100, 0 )
RETURN
    IF ( ISBLANK ( _total_kg ), "Veri yok",
         "Scope 1: " & FORMAT ( _s1_pct, "0" ) & "%  |  " &
         "Scope 2: " & FORMAT ( 100 - _s1_pct, "0" ) & "%" )

// Fosil kaynaklı HVAC CO₂ — gas_boiler/hybrid/biomass binaların ISITMA emisyonu
// Scope 1: Yakma kaynaklı, direkt bina sorumluluğu (CSRD mandatory disclosure)
VAR _gasF = 0.2017   -- kg CO₂/kWh gaz (BAFA/IPCC 2024, Almanya ortalama)
RETURN
    SUMX (

                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
            )
        RETURN
            IF ( _isScope1, COALESCE ( _hkwh, 0 ) * _gasF, 0 )
    )","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"V3: CO2 Scope2 kgCO2 v41","dataType":3,"expression":"
// Elektrik kaynaklı HVAC CO₂ — tüm sistemlerin soğutma + havalandırma
// + heat_pump/vrf/district/gshp binaların ısıtma elektrik tüketimi
// Scope 2: Satın alınan elektrik emisyonu (location-based)
VAR _elecF = 0.350   -- kg CO₂e/kWh EU ort. (EEA 2024; building-specific için silver[emission_factor] kullanılabilir)
RETURN
    SUMX (
        VALUES ( gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] ),
        VAR _bid = gold_hvac_analytics[building_id]
        VAR _sys =
            CALCULATE (
                MAX ( gold_hvac_analytics[system_type] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
            )
        VAR _isScope1 = _sys = "gas_boiler" || _sys = "hybrid" || _sys = "biomass"
        VAR _hkwh =
            CALCULATE (
                SUM ( gold_hvac_analytics[heating_energy_kwh] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
            )
        VAR _ckwh =
            CALCULATE (
                SUM ( gold_hvac_analytics[cooling_energy_kwh] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
            )
        VAR _vkwh =
            CALCULATE (
                SUM ( gold_hvac_analytics[ventilation_kwh] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
            )
        VAR _heat_scope2 = IF ( NOT _isScope1, COALESCE ( _hkwh, 0 ) * _elecF, 0 )
        VAR _cool_scope2 = COALESCE ( _ckwh, 0 ) * _elecF
        VAR _vent_scope2 = COALESCE ( _vkwh, 0 ) * _elecF
        RETURN _heat_scope2 + _cool_scope2 + _vent_scope2
    )","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"V3: CO2 Total tCO2 v41","dataType":3,"expression":"
// Tooltip veya ikincil gösterge — toplam tCO₂ (Scope 1+2)
VAR _s1 = [V3: CO2 Scope1 kgCO2 v41]
VAR _s2 = [V3: CO2 Scope2 kgCO2 v41]
RETURN

        DIVIDE ( COALESCE ( _s1, 0 ) + COALESCE ( _s2, 0 ), 1000 )
    )","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"references":{"unrecognizedReferences":false,"measures":[{"schema":"extension","entity":"gold_hvac_analytics","name":"V3: CO2 Scope1 kgCO2 v41"},{"schema":"extension","entity":"gold_hvac_analytics","name":"V3: CO2 Scope2 kgCO2 v41"}]},"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"V3: HP Transition Saving kgCO2 v41","dataType":3,"expression":"
// "Eğer tüm gaz binalar heat pump'a geçseydi ne kadar CO₂ tasarruf edilirdi?"
// CSRD Transition Plan için güçlü aksiyon metriği
VAR _gasF  = 0.2017
VAR _elecF = 0.350
VAR _cop   = 3.5    -- Ortalama HP SCOP (muhafazakar)
RETURN
    SUMX (
        VALUES ( gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] ),
        VAR _bid = gold_hvac_analytics[building_id]
        VAR _sys =
            CALCULATE (
                MAX ( gold_hvac_analytics[system_type] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
            )
        VAR _isGas = _sys = "gas_boiler" || _sys = "hybrid"
        VAR _hkwh =
            CALCULATE (
                SUM ( gold_hvac_analytics[heating_energy_kwh] ),
                FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
            )
        -- Şu anki gaz CO₂ vs HP'ye geçince scope 2 CO₂
        VAR _current_kg  = IF ( _isGas, COALESCE ( _hkwh, 0 ) * _gasF, 0 )
        VAR _hp_kwh      = COALESCE ( _hkwh, 0 ) / _cop   -- HP için elektrik tüketimi
        VAR _hp_kg       = IF ( _isGas, _hp_kwh * _elecF, 0 )
        RETURN _current_kg - _hp_kg
    )","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"V4: Heat Loss Annual kWh m2 v41","dataType":3,"expression":"

    )
RETURN
    IF ( ISBLANK ( _hl_monthly ), BLANK (), ROUND ( _hl_monthly * 12, 1 ) )

// Her bina için EPC sınıfı — V4 tooltipte veya ikincil tablo kolonunda kullan
VAR _bid = MAX ( silver_building_master[building_id] )
VAR _hl_monthly =
    CALCULATE (
        AVERAGE ( gold_hvac_analytics[heat_loss_kwh_m2] ),
        FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
    )
VAR _hl = _hl_monthly * 12
VAR _ins =
    CALCULATE (
        AVERAGE ( gold_hvac_analytics[insulation_score] ),
        FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
    )
// EPC sınıfı: heat loss + insulation kombinasyonu
VAR _epc =
    SWITCH ( TRUE (),
        ISBLANK ( _hl ),           "—",
        _hl <= 30 && _ins >= 80,   "A+",
        _hl <= 50 && _ins >= 70,   "A",
        _hl <= 70 && _ins >= 60,   "B",
        _hl <= 90 && _ins >= 50,   "C",
        _hl <= 120 && _ins >= 40,  "D",
        _hl <= 160 && _ins >= 30,  "E",
        _hl <= 200,                "F",
                                   "G"
    )
RETURN _epc","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"V4: Retrofit Urgency Score v41","dataType":3,"expression":"
// Yenileme aciliyeti skoru (0–100, yüksek = acil)
// heat_loss yüksek + insulation düşük + gaz sistem = en yüksek skor
VAR _bid = MAX ( silver_building_master[building_id] )
VAR _hl_monthly =
    CALCULATE (
        AVERAGE ( gold_hvac_analytics[heat_loss_kwh_m2] ),
        FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
    )
VAR _hl       = COALESCE ( _hl_monthly * 12, 0 )
VAR _ins      =
    CALCULATE (
        AVERAGE ( gold_hvac_analytics[insulation_score] ),
        FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
    )
VAR _ins_s    = COALESCE ( _ins, 50 )
VAR _sys =
    CALCULATE (
        MAX ( gold_hvac_analytics[system_type] ),
        FILTER ( gold_hvac_analytics, gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] = _bid )
    )
VAR _gas_penalty = IF ( _sys = "gas_boiler" || _sys = "hybrid", 20, 0 )
// Normalise: heat loss 0–200 → 0–50, insulation 100→0 – 0→50, gas penalty 0/20
VAR _hl_score  = MIN ( DIVIDE ( _hl, 200 ) * 50, 50 )
VAR _ins_score = MIN ( DIVIDE ( 100 - _ins_s, 100 ) * 30, 30 )
RETURN ROUND ( _hl_score + _ins_score + _gas_penalty, 0 )","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"Test Gold Count","dataType":3,"expression":"DISTINCTCOUNT ( gold_hvac_analytics[building_id] )","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"Card: HVAC Share v43","dataType":3,"expression":"

VAR _total_kg =

        VAR _sys  =

        VAR _ckwh =

        VAR _vkwh =

        VAR _hkg = IF ( _isS1, COALESCE(_hkwh,0)*_gasF, COALESCE(_hkwh,0)*_elecF )

        && gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_year] >= _today),
        gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_year])
VAR _eu_fb =
    MINX(FILTER(ALL(gold_crrem_pathway),
        gold_crrem_pathway[building_type]   = _btype
        && gold_crrem_pathway[country_code] = "EU"
        && gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_2c_kgco2_m2_yr] < _intensity
        && gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_year] >= _today),
        gold_crrem_pathway[pathway_year])
RETURN

VAR _kfw  = SELECTEDVALUE(gold_compliance_results[kfw_programs_applicable])
VAR _bafa = SELECTEDVALUE(gold_compliance_results[bafa_programs_applicable])
VAR _yeka = SELECTEDVALUE(gold_compliance_results[yeka_programs_applicable])
VAR _at   = SELECTEDVALUE(gold_compliance_results[at_incentives_applicable])
VAR _nl   = SELECTEDVALUE(gold_compliance_results[nl_incentives_applicable])
VAR _sep  = "  ·  "
VAR _raw  =
    IF(NOT ISBLANK(_kfw),  _kfw  & _sep, "") &
    IF(NOT ISBLANK(_bafa), _bafa & _sep, "") &
    IF(NOT ISBLANK(_yeka), _yeka & _sep, "") &
    IF(NOT ISBLANK(_at),   _at   & _sep, "") &
    IF(NOT ISBLANK(_nl),   _nl,           "")
// Son _sep artığını temizle
VAR _trimmed = TRIM(_raw)
VAR _clean =
    IF(
        RIGHT(_trimmed, LEN(_sep)) = _sep,
        LEFT(_trimmed, LEN(_trimmed) - LEN(_sep)),
        _trimmed
    )
RETURN
    IF(ISBLANK(_clean) || _clean = "",
       "No grants identified — select a building",
       _clean
    )

    REMOVEFILTERS('''Date''')

// Estimate cost for all anomaly rows in the live table.
// TODAY() removed — crashes KQL DirectQuery. No date filter needed:
// iot_hot_readings is already the recent rolling window.
VAR GridPrice = 0.20
VAR AvgDurH   = 0.50
RETURN
    CALCULATE(
        SUMX(
            FILTER(iot_hot_readings, iot_hot_readings[is_anomaly] = TRUE()),
            VAR ST  = iot_hot_readings[sensor_type]
            VAR Sev = iot_hot_readings[anomaly_severity]
            VAR ExtraKW =
                SWITCH(
                    TRUE(),
                    ST = "HVAC_temp"    && Sev = "High",   5.0,
                    ST = "HVAC_temp"    && Sev = "Medium",  2.5,
                    ST = "CO2"          && Sev = "High",    3.0,
                    ST = "CO2"          && Sev = "Medium",  1.5,
                    ST = "building_kwh" && Sev = "High",    8.0,
                    ST = "building_kwh" && Sev = "Medium",  3.0,
                    ST = "hvac_kwh"     && Sev = "High",    4.0,
                    ST = "hvac_kwh"     && Sev = "Medium",  2.0,
                    1.5
                )
            RETURN ExtraKW * AvgDurH * GridPrice
        ),
        REMOVEFILTERS('''Date''')
    )","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"C4_Alert_Label","dataType":3,"expression":"

// Total estimated anomaly cost today across all buildings in slicer context.
// Uses iot_anomaly_alerts — same cost model as C4_Alert_Cost_Today_EUR in v44.
VAR GridPrice = 0.20
VAR AvgDurH   = 0.50
RETURN
CALCULATE(
    SUMX(
        iot_anomaly_alerts,
        VAR ST  = iot_anomaly_alerts[sensor_type]
        VAR Sev = iot_anomaly_alerts[anomaly_severity]
        VAR ExtraKW =
            SWITCH(
                TRUE(),
                ST = "HVAC_temp"    && Sev = "High",   5.0,
                ST = "HVAC_temp"    && Sev = "Medium",  2.5,
                ST = "CO2"          && Sev = "High",    3.0,
                ST = "CO2"          && Sev = "Medium",  1.5,
                ST = "building_kwh" && Sev = "High",    8.0,
                ST = "building_kwh" && Sev = "Medium",  3.0,
                ST = "hvac_kwh"     && Sev = "High",    4.0,
                ST = "hvac_kwh"     && Sev = "Medium",  2.0,
                1.5
            )
        RETURN ExtraKW * AvgDurH * GridPrice
    ),
    iot_anomaly_alerts[alert_time] >= TODAY(),
    REMOVEFILTERS('''Date''')
)","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"IoT_High_Alert_Count","dataType":3,"expression":"

)","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"V3_Zone_Compliance_Color","dataType":3,"expression":"

VAR ST  = SELECTEDVALUE(iot_hot_readings[sensor_type], "unknown")
VAR Sev = SELECTEDVALUE(iot_hot_readings[anomaly_severity], "Low")
RETURN
    SWITCH(

        // Comfort sensors
        ST = "HVAC_temp"        && Sev = "High",   "Check HVAC setpoint — temp deviation >2°C",
        ST = "HVAC_temp"        && Sev = "Medium", "Monitor HVAC — temp slightly off setpoint",
        ST = "CO2"              && Sev = "High",   "Increase fresh air — IDA 4 (>1400 ppm)",
        ST = "CO2"              && Sev = "Medium", "Review ventilation schedule",
        ST = "humidity"         && Sev = "High",   "Check humidifier/dehumidifier setting",
        ST = "humidity"         && Sev = "Medium", "Monitor humidity — approaching limit",
        // Power sensors
        ST = "building_kwh"     && Sev = "High",   "Power spike detected — check load profile",
        ST = "building_kwh"     && Sev = "Medium", "Above-normal consumption — investigate",
        ST = "hvac_kwh"         && Sev = "High",   "HVAC overconsumption — inspect equipment",
        ST = "hvac_kwh"         && Sev = "Medium", "HVAC load elevated — check schedule",
        ST = "lighting_kwh"     && Sev = "High",   "Lighting spike — check occupancy sensors",
        ST = "lighting_kwh"     && Sev = "Medium", "Lighting above baseline — review schedule",
        ST = "plug_load_kwh"    && Sev = "High",   "Plug load spike — check unauthorized equipment",
        ST = "plug_load_kwh"    && Sev = "Medium", "Plug load elevated — identify source",
        // Supply/return delta-T
        ST = "HVAC_supply_temp" && Sev = "High",   "Supply air fault — check cooling/heating coil",
        ST = "HVAC_supply_temp" && Sev = "Medium", "Supply temp drifting — inspect AHU controls",
        ST = "HVAC_return_temp" && Sev = "High",   "Poor delta-T — check air distribution system",
        ST = "HVAC_return_temp" && Sev = "Medium", "Return temp irregular — check zone dampers",
        // Mechanical equipment
        ST = "boiler_eff"       && Sev = "High",   "Boiler efficiency critical (<75%) — schedule service",
        ST = "boiler_eff"       && Sev = "Medium", "Boiler efficiency declining — preventive check",
        ST = "chiller_cop"      && Sev = "High",   "Chiller COP critically low — check refrigerant",
        ST = "chiller_cop"      && Sev = "Medium", "Chiller efficiency declining — inspect coils",
        ST = "pump_pressure"    && Sev = "High",   "Pressure fault — check pump and expansion vessel",
        ST = "pump_pressure"    && Sev = "Medium", "Pressure irregular — monitor system",
        ST = "fan_rpm"          && Sev = "High",   "Fan over/underspeed — inspect VFD and belts",
        ST = "fan_rpm"          && Sev = "Medium", "Fan RPM irregular — check filter and belt",
        // Fallback — should not appear for known sensor types
        "Inspect " & ST & " reading"
    )","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"V4_Est_Cost_EUR","dataType":3,"expression":"
// Estimated cost contribution of anomaly readings in current row context.
// Uses same energy logic as C4_Alert_Cost_Today_EUR.
VAR GridPrice = 0.20
VAR AvgDurH   = 0.50
VAR ST  = SELECTEDVALUE(iot_hot_readings[sensor_type], "")
VAR Sev = SELECTEDVALUE(iot_hot_readings[anomaly_severity], "Low")
VAR ExtraKW =
    SWITCH(
        TRUE(),
        ST = "HVAC_temp"    && Sev = "High",   5.0,
        ST = "HVAC_temp"    && Sev = "Medium",  2.5,
        ST = "CO2"          && Sev = "High",    3.0,
        ST = "CO2"          && Sev = "Medium",  1.5,
        ST = "building_kwh" && Sev = "High",    8.0,
        ST = "building_kwh" && Sev = "Medium",  3.0,
        ST = "hvac_kwh"     && Sev = "High",    4.0,
        ST = "hvac_kwh"     && Sev = "Medium",  2.0,
        1.5
    )
VAR AnomalyCount =
    CALCULATE(
        COUNTROWS(iot_hot_readings),
        iot_hot_readings[is_anomaly] = TRUE()

        1.5
    )
RETURN
    IF(NOT ISBLANK(Sev), ROUND(ExtraKW * AvgDurH * GridPrice, 2), BLANK())","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"V4_Cost_Label","dataType":3,"expression":"
